functions.name: AGAVG
functions.description: Returns an average of time series. `(Expr1 + Expr2 + ... + ExprN)/N`. If Expr[I] value for a day J is NA, doesn't include value[I,J] in the average.

functions.name: AGMAX
functions.description: Returns a maximum of time series Expr1 to ExprN. If ExprI value for a day J is NA, doesn't include value[I,J] while calculating max.

functions.name: AGMIN
functions.description: Returns a minimum of time series Expr1 to ExprN. If ExprI value for a day J is NA, doesn't include value[I,J] while calculating min.

functions.name: AGMUL
functions.description: Returns a product of time series Expr1 to ExprN. `Expr1 * Expr2 * ... * ExprN`. If Expr[I] value for a day J is NA, doesn't include value[I,J] in the product.

functions.name: AGNUMVALID
functions.description: Calculates a number of valid values of time series 1-N on the given day.

functions.name: AGSUM
functions.description: Returns a sum of time series Expr1 to ExprN. `Expr1 + Expr2 + ... + ExprN`. If Expr[I] value for a day J is NA, doesn't include value[I,J] in the sum.

functions.name: BDINM
functions.description: Returns the number of business days in the month of the current query date.

functions.name: BDINY
functions.description: Returns the number of business days in the year of the current query date.

functions.name: BDTODT
functions.description: Returns the number of business days from the current query date to the given date, given in mm/dd/yy format.

functions.name: DATE
functions.description: Returns the current date in the evaluation as a number in yyyymmdd format.

functions.name: DAY
functions.description: Returns the weekday of the current query date (Mon=1, Sun=7).

functions.name: DOFM
functions.description: Returns the day number of the month in the current query date.

functions.name: DOFY
functions.description: Returns the day number of the year in the current query date.

functions.name: DINM
functions.description: Returns the number of days in the current query date's month.

functions.name: DINY
functions.description: Returns the number of days in the current query date's year.

functions.name: ENDDT
functions.description: Returns the end date of the query (as a number in yyyymmdd format) for each day in the query period.

functions.name: DTODT
functions.description: Returns the number of days from the current query date to the given date, given in mm/dd/yy form.

functions.name: JDAYS
functions.description: Without an argument, returns the Julian day offset (days from January 1, 1970) of the current day in the query. You may also specify a date argument, such as a particular date or the results of another function that returns a series of dates.

functions.name: MONTH
functions.description: Returns the month of the current query date.

functions.name: NBDAYS
functions.description: Returns the number of business days between the two given dates.

functions.name: NDAYS
functions.description: Returns the number of days between the two given dates. Syntax: `NDAYS(dt1, dt2)` where both dates are required (mm/dd/yy format).

functions.name: STARTDT
functions.description: Returns the start date of the query (as a number in yyyymmdd format) for each day in the query period.

functions.name: YEAR
functions.description: Returns the year of the current day in the query date range.

functions.name: ACCRUED
functions.description: Returns accrued interest for the given ETP bond symbol. Accrued is calculated as of regular settlement for the given trade (query) date. *Only works with government bonds from the ETP Database.*

functions.name: BASIS
functions.description: Cash-futures basis. `Basis = BondPrice - FuturesPrice * ConvFactor`

functions.name: BDTODELIV
functions.description: Returns the number of business days from the current query date to delivery of the given futures contract. Optional DelivCode (FIRST or LAST) specifies delivery at beginning or end of the delivery period. Default: end.

functions.name: BDTOEXPN
functions.description: Returns the number of business days to (listed) option expiration.

functions.name: BDTOLTD
functions.description: Returns the number of business days to the last trading day of the given futures contract.

functions.name: BIMPVOL
functions.description: Business day implied volatility for the given options position. Example: `BIMPVOL(ed95z, (ATM CALL, ATM PUT))`

functions.name: BNOC
functions.description: Basis Net of Carry. Optional DelivCode (FIRST or LAST). Default: end. `BNOC = basis + coupon income - financing cost`

functions.name: BNOCRP
functions.description: Basis Net of Carry using a term repo rate to delivery. Optional DelivCode (FIRST or LAST). Default: end.

functions.name: CALIRP
functions.description: Repo rate implied by the spread between two futures positions, or between a cash and a futures position. Optional DelivCode (FIRST or LAST). Default: end.

functions.name: CASHROLL
functions.description: Returns the rolling cash yield or price for hot-run bonds.

functions.name: DELIV
functions.description: Returns the delivery date (yyyymmdd) of the given futures contract. DelivCode may be FIRST or LAST.

functions.name: DTODELIV
functions.description: Returns the number of days from the current query date to delivery of the given futures contract. Specify FIRST or LAST for DelivCode.

functions.name: DTOEXPN
functions.description: Returns the number of days from the current query date to the expiration of the given options contract.

functions.name: DTOLTD
functions.description: Returns the number of days from the current query date to the last trading day of the given futures contract.

functions.name: DTOMAT
functions.description: Returns the number of days from the current query date to the maturity of the given ETP bond.

functions.name: DV01
functions.description: Returns the price value of a basis point for the given ETP bond. (Same as PVBP.)

functions.name: EXPN
functions.description: Returns the expiration date (yyyymmdd) of the given futures options contract.

functions.name: FACTOR
functions.description: Returns the conversion factor for the given deliverable bond and futures contract. *Bond must be an ETP bond symbol.*

functions.name: FWD
functions.description: Returns the forward rate implied by the given ETP yield series. YSeries form: `[ticker]Ynn` (e.g. US, FG + term in years like 02, 05, 10, 30).

functions.name: FWDPRICE
functions.description: Returns the forward price of a bond. BondSymbol is an ETP bond symbol. FwdDateIndicator can be a date (mm/dd/yy), 3B/3D/3M/3Y, or FIRST/LAST. Carry rate indicator: REPO, GC, or LIBOR.

functions.name: FWSP
functions.description: Returns the forward weighted spread (duration weighted difference) between the forward strip yield and the forward yield implied by the given short and long maturity bond.

functions.name: IMPREPO
functions.description: Returns the repo rate implied by the basis between the given ETP bond and futures series. Optional DelivCode (FIRST or LAST). Default: end.

functions.name: IMPVOL
functions.description: Returns the implied volatility for the given options position. Example: `IMPVOL(ed95z, (ATM CALL, ATM PUT))`

functions.name: IMPVOLF
functions.description: Returns implied volatility on an option position for a fixed period (months). Example: `IMPVOLF(2, SERIAL, ft, option 5, (ATM CALL, ATM PUT))`. SERIAL keyword and SwitchCode are optional.

value.name: IMPVOLF(2, SERIAL, ft, option 5, (ATM CALL, ATM PUT))

functions.name: LTD
functions.description: Returns the last trading date (yyyymmdd) of the given futures contract.

functions.name: MATDT
functions.description: Returns the maturity date (yyyymmdd) of a bond or T-bill. *Only works on ETP bond or T-bill symbols.*

functions.name: MODDUR
functions.description: Returns the modified duration for the given bond. *Only works for ETP database bond symbols.*

functions.name: PREMIUM
functions.description: Returns the net premium for the given options position. Example: `PREMIUM(ed95z, (ATM CALL))`

functions.name: PRICE
functions.description: Returns the price of the given ETP yield series.

functions.name: PVBP
functions.description: Returns the price value of a basis point for the given ETP bond. (Same as DV01.)

functions.name: RATE
functions.description: Returns rate values and properties given a curve, forward start, and tenor. Curve is defined as `<ccy><sector>`. Available curves include: "usdagency", "usdswap", "usdtreas". Syntax: `RATE(<curve>, ForwardStart, Tenor)`. Example: `RATE(usdtreas, 0Y, 10Y)`

functions.name: ROLLING
functions.description: Returns the price (or data attribute) of the given futures ticker. RollCode: front, back, back2, etc. Optional SwitchCode for roll behavior. Examples: `ROLLING(front, ed)`, `ROLLING(back2, us, option,.iv)`

functions.name: STOCHASTIC
functions.description: Contact ETP Research for details.

functions.name: STRIKE
functions.description: Returns the strike for the given options position. Example: `STRIKE(rolling front ed, (ATM CALL))`

functions.name: TSYRATE
functions.description: Returns swap rates and properties for a given forward start and tenor. Syntax: `TSYRATE(ForwardStart, Tenor)`. Example: `TSYRATE(0Y, 10Y)`

functions.name: WSP
functions.description: Returns the weighted spread (duration weighted difference) between the money market strip and bond yields.

functions.name: YIELD
functions.description: Returns the yield to worst for the given ETP bond series. For T-Bills, specify MMKT or BEY as 2nd argument. Use GADJ flag for Gross Adjusted Yield on Italian government bonds.

functions.name: YTC
functions.description: Yield to 1st call for the given ETP bond series.

functions.name: YTM
functions.description: Yield to maturity for the given ETP bond series.

functions.name: ABS
functions.description: Returns the absolute value of a given expression.

functions.name: CEIL
functions.description: Returns the least integral value >= expression.

functions.name: EXP
functions.description: Returns e (2.71828) raised to a given expression's value.

functions.name: EXP10
functions.description: Returns 10 raised to a given expression's value.

functions.name: FLOOR
functions.description: Returns the greatest integral value <= expression.

functions.name: LN
functions.description: Returns the natural logarithm of a given expression.

functions.name: LOG
functions.description: Returns the natural logarithm of a given expression.

functions.name: LOG10
functions.description: Returns the Base10 logarithm of a given expression.

functions.name: ROUND
functions.description: Returns the value of a given expression rounded to nearest integral value.

functions.name: SQRT
functions.description: Returns the square root for a given expression.

functions.name: BOFM
functions.description: Returns the first valid observation of the month for the rest of the month. If range does not include beginning of the month, the rest of the first month values set to NA.

functions.name: BOFW
functions.description: Returns the first valid observation of the week for the rest of week. If range does not include beginning of the week, the rest of the first week values set to NA.

functions.name: BOFY
functions.description: Returns the first valid observation of the year for the rest of year. If range does not include beginning of the year, the rest of the first year values set to NA.

functions.name: EOFM
functions.description: Returns the last valid observation of the month for the rest of the month. If range does not include end of the month, the rest of the last month values set to NA.

functions.name: EOFW
functions.description: Returns the last valid observation of the week for the rest of week. If range does not include end of the week, the rest of the last week values set to NA.

functions.name: EOFY
functions.description: Returns the last valid observation of the year for the rest of year. If range does not include end of the year, the rest of the last (current) year values set to NA.

functions.name: FALSE
functions.description: Returns the number 0, representing logical FALSE.

functions.name: IF
functions.description: If Expr1 is True (not zero), result of Expr2 is returned. If Expr1 is False (zero), result of Expr3 is returned. Arguments are evaluated for each day in the query date range.

functions.name: ISNA
functions.description: Returns True (1) if a given expression is N/A, or False (0) if valid.

functions.name: ISVALID
functions.description: Returns True (1) if a given expression is valid, or False (0) if N/A.

functions.name: MONTHLY
functions.description: Prunes the data into monthly frequency. Frequency conversion is based on the context setting.

functions.name: NA
functions.description: Returns N/A for every day in the query date range.

functions.name: NAIFZERO
functions.description: Returns N/A when a given expression equals zero.

functions.name: NEXTVALID
functions.description: Fill in missing points in the series with the next closest day's value. Will not look forward beyond the end date of the query.

functions.name: ORDINATE
functions.description: Returns the daily offset of each day in the query period.

functions.name: PERFIRST
functions.description: Returns the first valid observation for all days in the range.

functions.name: PERLAST
functions.description: Returns the last valid observation for all days in the range.

functions.name: PREVVALID
functions.description: Returns the most recent valid value for a day when the expression is NA. Will not look back prior to the start date. Optional date parameter for checking last valid value in a given range. Example: `PREVVALID(N10.Y, DATE=[1Y,])`

functions.name: QUARTERLY
functions.description: Prunes the data into quarterly frequency. Frequency conversion is based on the context setting.

functions.name: RAND
functions.description: Returns a random number between 0 and 1. Optional seed parameter.

functions.name: SIGN
functions.description: Returns the sign of a given expression. -1 for negative, 1 for positive, 0 for zero.

functions.name: SORT
functions.description: Returns the results of a given expression as a sorted list of values, placing NAs at the bottom. Results are not related to the dates on which they appear.

functions.name: TRUE
functions.description: Returns the number 1, representing logical TRUE.

functions.name: WEEKLY
functions.description: Prunes the data into weekly frequency. Frequency conversion is based on the context setting.

functions.name: YEARLY
functions.description: Prunes the data into Annual frequency. Frequency conversion is based on the context setting.

functions.name: ZEROIFNA
functions.description: Returns zero if a given expression equals N/A.

functions.name: ADJRSQR
functions.description: Returns the adjusted R-squared from the regression of ExprY vs one or more ExprX over the previous NDays. Takes into account degrees of freedom.

functions.name: ARVOL
functions.description: Returns NDays historical arithmetic volatility. `chg = X[n] - X[n-1]`, `mean = (sum of chg)/npoints`, `sumsqr = sum of (chg * chg)`, `vol = SQRT((sumsqr - npoints*mean*mean) / (npoints-1)) * SQRT(251)`

functions.name: BETA
functions.description: Returns the coefficient of the 1st independent variable from linear regression of ExprY vs ExprX over the last NDays. NDays can be NYears (e.g. `1y`), NMonths (`1m`), or NWeeks (`3w`).

functions.name: CHG
functions.description: Returns the change in value of expression from NDays back to current day. Default NDays = 1.

functions.name: CORR
functions.description: Returns the correlation between ExprY and ExprX over the previous NDays.

functions.name: COVA
functions.description: Returns the covariance of ExprY versus ExprX over the previous NDays.

functions.name: ERF
functions.description: Returns the error function of UpperLimit for a normal distribution. Optional Mu, Sigma, LowerLimit. Defaults: Mu=0, Sigma=1/sqrt(2), LowerLimit=0.

functions.name: ERFC
functions.description: Returns the error function complement of UpperLimit for a normal distribution. Optional Mu, Sigma, LowerLimit. Defaults: Mu=0, Sigma=1/sqrt(2), LowerLimit=0.

functions.name: ESS
functions.description: Returns the error sum of squares (residual variation of ExprY) for the given variables.

functions.name: EWMAAVG
functions.description: Returns NDays exponentially weighted moving average. Syntax: `EWMAAVG(NDays, Expr, Factor)`. `EWMAAVG(1) = Y(1)`. For t > 1: `EWMAAVG(t) = Factor * Y(t) + (1 - Factor) * EWMAAVG(t-1)`. Factor is smoothing factor between 0 and 1.

functions.name: EWMACORR
functions.description: Returns NDays exponentially weighted moving average correlation. Syntax: `EWMACORR(NDays, Expr1, Expr2, Factor)`. Factor is a decay factor (0-1). Uses weighted covariance divided by weighted standard deviations.

functions.name: EWMAVOL
functions.description: Returns NDays exponentially weighted moving average volatility. Syntax: `EWMAVOL(NDays, Expr, Factor)`. Factor is a decay factor (0-1). `chg = X[n] - X[n-1]`, `vol = SQRT(weighted_sumsq/accumulated_factor) * SQRT(251) * 100`

functions.name: FSTAT
functions.description: Returns the F-statistic from linear regression of ExprY vs ExprX over the last NDays. Tests significance of R-squared.

functions.name: INDEX
functions.description: Returns the indexed value of a given expression (1st day in date range = 100).

functions.name: INTERCEPT
functions.description: Returns the intercept (constant) from linear regression of ExprY vs ExprX over the last NDays.

functions.name: IQR
functions.description: Returns the interquartile range over the last NDays.

functions.name: KURTOSIS
functions.description: Returns NDays excess kurtosis of a given expression for each day in the query date range.

functions.name: LAG
functions.description: Returns the result of a given expression from NDays ago. Default NDays = 1.

functions.name: LOGCHG
functions.description: Returns the logarithmic change from the previous day: `LOG(Val[x]/Val[x-1])`

functions.name: LOGNORMCDF
functions.description: Returns CDF of a lognormal distribution with Mu, Sigma, optional UpperLimit and LowerLimit. Defaults: UpperLimit=0, LowerLimit=0.

functions.name: LOGNORMCDFC
functions.description: Returns CDF complement of a lognormal distribution. Defaults: UpperLimit=0, LowerLimit=0.

functions.name: LOGNORMPDF
functions.description: Returns PDF of X for a lognormal distribution. Defaults: Mu=0, Sigma=1.

functions.name: MAX
functions.description: Returns the maximum value of a given expression over the last NDays.

functions.name: MEDIAN
functions.description: Returns NDays median of a given expression on each date. For even observations, middle two values are averaged.

functions.name: MIN
functions.description: Returns the minimum value of a given expression over the last NDays.

functions.name: MODEL
functions.description: Returns the linear regression model for ExprY (dependent) vs ExprX1, ExprX2, etc. (independent).

functions.name: MOVAVG
functions.description: Returns NDays average of a given expression on each date. Optional Type (1=sigma trim, 2=winsorized) and Threshold for outlier rejection.

functions.name: MUL
functions.description: Returns the product over the last NDays. If 1st argument missing, returns total product from start date. Returns value if at least 1 valid observation present.

functions.name: NDEVS
functions.description: Returns the number of standard deviations that a given expression deviates from its NDays mean.

functions.name: NORMCDF
functions.description: Returns CDF of a normal distribution. Defaults: UpperLimit=0, LowerLimit=-infinity.

functions.name: NORMCDFC
functions.description: Returns CDF complement of a normal distribution. Defaults: UpperLimit=0, LowerLimit=-infinity.

functions.name: NORMPDF
functions.description: Returns PDF of X for a normal distribution. Defaults: Mu=0, Sigma=1.

functions.name: OBS
functions.description: Returns the observation number for a given expression. Counts only valid observations. Use ORDINATE() for absolute day count.

functions.name: PCTCHG
functions.description: Returns percent change for NDays: `((Val[x]/Val[x-NDays]) - 1) * 100`. Default NDays = 1.

functions.name: PERAVG
functions.description: Returns periodic average over the query date range. Same value returned for all days.

functions.name: PERCENTILE
functions.description: Returns percentile rank. Syntax variants: `PERCENTILE(Expr)` — rank of each observation over entire period. `PERCENTILE(NDays, Expr)` — rank in rolling window. `PERCENTILE(NDays, Expr, Rank)` — value at given percentile rank in rolling window.

functions.name: PERHIGH
functions.description: Returns periodic high over the query date range. Same value for all days.

functions.name: PERLOW
functions.description: Returns periodic low over the query date range. Same value for all days.

functions.name: PERMEDIAN
functions.description: Returns periodic median over the query date range. Same value for all days.

functions.name: PERSTD
functions.description: Returns periodic standard deviation over the query date range. Same value for all days.

functions.name: PNL
functions.description: Returns the change in value from the first day in the query date range.

functions.name: RANK
functions.description: Returns the ordered rank for each observation in a given expression.

functions.name: RESIDUAL
functions.description: Returns residual value from regression. Syntax: `RESIDUAL([NDays], ExprY, ExprX1 [, Expr2,...])`. ExprY is the dependent variable, ExprX1 (and optional Expr2,...) are independent variables. Without NDays: each day in query period. With NDays: last day of each rolling period. NDays can be NYears/NMonths/NWeeks (e.g. `1y`, `1m`, `3w`).

functions.name: RMS
functions.description: Returns NDays Root Mean Square. `sumsqr = sum of X[n]*X[n]`, `RMS = SQRT(sumsqr/npts)`

functions.name: RMSVOL
functions.description: Returns NDays Root Mean Square Volatility. `pctchg = log(X[n]/X[n-1])`, `RMSVOL = SQRT(sumsqr/npts) * SQRT(251) * 100`

functions.name: RSI
functions.description: Computes the Relative Strength Index. Default NDays = 14.

functions.name: RSQR
functions.description: Returns R-squared from regression — proportion of total variation in ExprY explained by regression vs ExprX.

functions.name: RSS
functions.description: Returns regression sum of squares (explained variation of ExprY).

functions.name: SKEW
functions.description: Returns NDays skew of a given expression for each day in the query date range.

functions.name: SEALPHA
functions.description: Returns standard error of the constant term from linear regression of ExprY vs ExprX over last NDays.

functions.name: SEBETA
functions.description: Returns standard error of the 1st independent variable from linear regression over last NDays.

functions.name: SEREG
functions.description: Returns standard error from linear regression of ExprY vs ExprX over last NDays.

functions.name: STDDEV
functions.description: Returns NDays standard deviation. `meansqr = (mean^2)/npts`, `STDDEV = SQRT((sumsqr - meansqr) / (npts - 1))`

functions.name: SUM
functions.description: Returns sum over last NDays. If 1st argument missing, returns running total from start date. Returns value if at least 1 valid observation present. Note: `SUM(NDays, Expr)/NDays` may not equal `MOVAVG(NDays, Expr)`.

functions.name: TSALPHA
functions.description: Returns T-statistic for the constant term from regression. Magnitude >= 2 often indicates statistical significance. Equal to term value / standard error.

functions.name: TSBETA
functions.description: Returns T-statistic for the 1st independent variable from regression. Magnitude >= 2 often indicates significance. Equal to coefficient / standard error.

functions.name: TSS
functions.description: Returns total regression sum of squares (ESS + RSS).

functions.name: VAR
functions.description: Returns NDays variance. `meansqr = (mean^2)/npts`, `VAR = (sumsqr - meansqr) / (npts - 1)`

functions.name: VOL
functions.description: Returns NDays historical volatility. `pctchg = LOG(X[n]/X[n-1])`, `vol = SQRT((sumsqr - npoints*mean*mean) / (npoints-1)) * SQRT(251)`

functions.name: ZSCORE
functions.description: Without NDays: returns zscore for each observation (deviation from mean / stddev). With NDays: zscore of last observation in rolling periods. Multiple expressions supported (uses regression standard error).
